prompt: Update display_name to fall back to the normalized email when both name fields are blank, and to 'Unknown' when no name or email exists. Add regression tests and run the suite.

argv: import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'src'); from profiles import display_name; assert display_name({'first_name':' ', 'last_name':'', 'email':' ADA@EXAMPLE.COM '}) == 'ada@example.com'; assert display_name({}) == 'Unknown'
